pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh (line 9: PROJECT_DIR="/home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/CalculatorApp") and export_result.sh. This is the runtime working directory where the agent modifies the Android project during task execution. Standard path for Android Studio user 'ga' as defined in env.json (lines 76-93).

Verified in setup_task.sh (line 10: DATA_SOURCE="/workspace/data/CalculatorApp") and env.json (line 70: mount maps 'examples/android_studio_env/data' to '/workspace/data'). Actual file location: benchmarks/cua_world/environments/android_studio_env/data/CalculatorApp. Confirmed directory contains valid Android Gradle project with build.gradle.kts, app/build.gradle.kts, and Android source structure.

Verified in task description (lines 4-5): 'Add a "tier" flavor dimension with "free" and "premium" product flavors'. README.md (line 20): 'build.gradle.kts has "free" and "premium" productFlavors'. verifier.py (lines 92-93) checks for exactly these flavor names with regex patterns: 'free\s*\{' and 'premium\s*\{'.

Verified in task description (line 5): 'Add a "staging" build type for QA testing'. Initial build.gradle.kts (app/build.gradle.kts line 20-28) contains explicit 'release' buildType; 'debug' is the default Android buildType. README.md (line 21) confirms: 'build.gradle.kts has a "staging" buildType'. verifier.py (lines 111-114) checks for staging buildType.

privileged_info_summary: The configure_build_variants task operates on a real Android CalculatorApp project located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/CalculatorApp (sourced from /workspace/data/CalculatorApp). The task requires adding product flavors ('free' and 'premium') in a 'tier' flavor dimension, and introducing a 'staging' build type to complement the existing debug and release build types. The data source is a genuine Android Gradle project with minSdk 24, targetSdk 34, compileSdk 34, and default applicationId com.example.calculator with app_name 'Calculator'.
